headline: 1 Consumer Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Consumer staples stocks are solid insurance policies in frothy markets ripe for corrections. On the other hand, they usually underperform during bull runs, and this paradigm has rung true over the past six months as the sector’s -4.3% decline paled in comparison to the S&P 500’s 5.1% gain.
